# Invasiondepth

**Summary**: The distance into the formation that drilling fluid and solids travel.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] measured invasion depth to determine the extent of solid particle penetration.

## Scientific Context

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] Used to determine the extent of solid particle penetration.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] Measured using ultrasonic techniques.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Larger median particle sizes resulted in lower invasion depths. ([[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001, p. 17]])
- [[2001-mohammed|Mohammed, 2001]] Decreased as median particle size increased.
